title: dalbergia lastoursvillensis
intro: Dalbergia lastoursvillensis, also known as the Lastoursville Dalbergia, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae, commonly found in the tropical forests of Central Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce pain, swelling, and inflammation. The health benefits of Dalbergia lastoursvillensis include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
